params.name: name
params.description: Exact card name. Use a pipe (`|`) to query multiple names in one call (e.g. `Baby Dragon|Time Wizard`).

params.name: fname
params.description: Fuzzy / partial card name search.

params.name: id
params.description: Card passcode (8-digit numeric id). Comma-separated for multiple ids.

params.name: konami_id
params.description: Konami official card id (different from the printed passcode).

params.name: type
params.description: Card type (e.g. `Effect Monster`, `Synchro Monster`, `Spell Card`, `Trap Card`, `Link Monster`).

params.name: race
params.description: Monster race (for monsters) or sub-type (for Spell/Trap, e.g. `Continuous`, `Quick-Play`, `Counter`).

params.name: attribute
params.description: Monster attribute.

params.name: level
params.description: Monster level or rank. Supports comparison operators `lt`, `lte`, `gt`, `gte` (e.g. `gte4`).

params.name: link
params.description: Link rating for Link Monsters.

params.name: linkmarker
params.description: Link marker positions (one or more, comma-separated). Values are `Top`, `Bottom`, `Left`, `Right`, `Top-Left`, `Top-Right`, `Bottom-Left`, `Bottom-Right`.

params.name: atk
params.description: ATK value filter. Supports comparison operators `lt`, `lte`, `gt`, `gte` (e.g. `gte2500`).

params.name: def
params.description: DEF value filter. Supports comparison operators `lt`, `lte`, `gt`, `gte`.

params.name: scale
params.description: Pendulum scale value.

params.name: archetype
params.description: Archetype name (see `/archetypes.php` for the complete list).

params.name: cardset
params.description: Card set name (see `/cardsets.php` for the complete list).

params.name: banlist
params.description: Banlist type to filter against.

params.name: format
params.description: Tournament format legality filter.

params.name: staple
params.description: Pass `yes` to filter to staple cards only.

params.name: has_effect
params.description: Pass `true` or `false` to filter cards by whether they have an actual effect.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order for the result set.

params.name: misc
params.description: Pass `yes` to include extended metadata (views, upvotes, formats, treated_as, release dates, konami_id, md_rarity, has_effect, genesys_points).

params.name: tcgplayer_data
params.description: Pass `yes` to use TCGplayer card set data instead of the default.

params.name: language
params.description: Language code for card text. Default is English (omit). Supported alternatives are `fr`, `de`, `it`, `pt`.

params.name: startdate
params.description: Start date (`YYYY-MM-DD`) for release-date filtering.

params.name: enddate
params.description: End date (`YYYY-MM-DD`) for release-date filtering.

params.name: dateregion
params.description: Region whose release dates the `startdate`/`enddate` window applies to (e.g. `tcg_date`, `ocg_date`).

params.name: num
params.description: Page size (results per page). Pair with `offset` for pagination.

params.name: offset
params.description: Pagination offset (0-based).

items.docs:
Search and filter the complete Yu-Gi-Oh! card database. Without parameters, returns all
cards (large payload — clients should always pass filters). Filter by name, fuzzy name,
passcode id, type, race, attribute, level, link rating, link markers, ATK/DEF (with
comparison operators `lt`, `lte`, `gt`, `gte`), pendulum scale, archetype, banlist, format,
and more. Supports sorting, pagination (`num` + `offset`), language switching, and an
extended metadata mode via `misc=yes`.

Return a single random Yu-Gi-Oh! card. The endpoint accepts no parameters and its
response is intentionally uncached so each call returns a different card.

Return every Yu-Gi-Oh! card set known to YGOPRODeck — over 1,000 entries — with set
name, set code, card count, TCG release date, and set image URL. Takes no parameters.

info.name: YGOPRODeck Get Card Set Print Info

params.name: setcode
params.description: Set code identifying a specific card printing (e.g. `LOB-EN001`).

items.docs:
Look up the per-print details for a specific set-code (e.g. `LOB-EN001`) — the card id,
card name, set name, set code, rarity, and market price.

Return every recognised Yu-Gi-Oh! archetype name. Useful to populate archetype pickers
and to validate the `archetype` parameter on `/cardinfo.php`.

info.name: YGOPRODeck Get Valid Card Filter Values

items.docs:
Return the canonical valid value enumerations used by the search engine — every card
type, monster race, monster attribute, level, link marker, and the per-card-class
(MONSTER / SPELL / TRAP / SKILL) breakdowns. Drives client-side dropdowns and validates
cardinfo query parameters before submission.

Return the current YGOPRODeck card database version and last-updated timestamp. Clients
should poll this endpoint and invalidate their local cache when the version changes.
